title: Load landing page with correct time-based theme
description: Verify the landing page loads with the correct theme based on the user's local time, displaying Morning Light theme in the morning hours and Abyssal Night theme during night hours.

steps.description: Set device local time to 08:00 AM
Navigate to the landing page
Confirm Morning Light theme is applied with corresponding WebGL visuals and ambient audio
Set device local time to 10:00 PM
Reload the landing page
Confirm Abyssal Night theme is applied with corresponding WebGL visuals and ambient audio

title: Display immersive 3D visuals and ambient audio on landing page
description: Check that the landing page shows full-screen WebGL 3D Voronoi fluid shaders with smooth animations and plays calming ambient audio by default.

steps.description: Navigate to the landing page
Ensure full-screen WebGL CausticOcean shaders are rendered and animations run smoothly
Verify calming ambient audio is playing

title: Booking can be created only for Sundays and Mondays
description: Validate that booking is restricted strictly to Sundays and Mondays only when selecting dates for appointment scheduling.

steps.description: Open booking page and view available dates
Verify selectable dates are only Sundays and Mondays
Attempt to select a date that is Tuesday
Confirm that the Tuesday date is not selectable

title: Prevent double bookings for the same slot
description: Verify the system enforces no double-booking for the same date and time slot using backend database locking and validation.

steps.description: Create a booking for Sunday at 10 AM
Booking is created successfully with status confirmed
Attempt to create a second booking for the same Sunday 10 AM slot
Booking request is rejected/prevented due to slot already being booked

title: Complete booking flow including payment and confirmation email
description: Test the end-to-end booking flow where user selects valid slot, proceeds with Razorpay payment, and receives automated booking confirmation email.

steps.description: Select available booking slot on Sunday
Enter valid contact information
Proceed to payment using Razorpay
Payment is processed successfully
Booking is created and recorded in Supabase database
Automated booking confirmation email is received via EmailJS

title: Validate Razorpay payment signature verification
description: Ensure Razorpay payment signatures are correctly verified to confirm authenticity of payment responses during booking.

steps.description: Simulate Razorpay payment response with valid signature for a booking
Signature verification passes and booking payment is accepted
Simulate Razorpay payment response with invalid signature
Signature verification fails and payment is rejected

title: Admin login with JWT authentication
description: Verify that admin users can login to the admin panel using valid JWT tokens and that invalid tokens are rejected.

steps.description: Attempt admin login with valid credentials
JWT token is generated and admin panel access granted
Attempt admin login with invalid credentials
Access denied with appropriate error
Try accessing protected admin API routes without a JWT token
Access denied due to missing or invalid JWT

title: Admin booking management functionality
description: Test admin capabilities to view bookings, update booking statuses, and add meeting links to confirmed bookings.

steps.description: Login as admin with JWT
Access booking dashboard
Bookings list is displayed with correct data
Update status of a booking to 'confirmed'
Booking status is updated and saved correctly
Add meeting link to a confirmed booking
Meeting link is saved and displayed properly in booking details

title: Booking API input validation and error handling
description: Verify that the booking API validates inputs correctly and returns appropriate error messages for invalid or missing data.

steps.description: Send booking request with missing required fields
API returns 400 Bad Request with descriptive validation error messages
Send booking request with invalid date (non-Sunday/Monday)
API returns error informing the date is not allowed for booking
Send booking request with malformed contact information
API rejects request due to invalid contact details

title: PWA installation and offline support
description: Confirm that the app can be installed as a Progressive Web App on supported platforms and can function offline with cached content.

steps.description: Open the app on a supported mobile device or desktop
Trigger PWA installation prompt and install the app
App is installed and launched natively with PWA features
Disconnect network and launch the installed PWA app
App loads landing page and cached content successfully offline

title: Performance validation of tiered graphics rendering at 60fps
description: Verify that the performance optimization tiered graphics rendering maintains smooth 60fps experience on various devices ranging from budget Androids to high-end iPhones.

steps.description: Load the landing page on a budget Android device
Rendering runs at 60fps with tiered graphics settings automatically applied
Load the landing page on a high-end iPhone
Rendering runs at 60fps with highest graphics settings

title: Security: Verify CORS restrictions on API endpoints
description: Ensure that the backend APIs enforce proper CORS policies, preventing unauthorized cross-origin requests.

steps.description: Send API request to booking endpoint from authorized origin
Request is accepted and processed successfully
Send same API request from unauthorized origin
Request is blocked by CORS policy

title: Rate limiting on booking creation endpoint
description: Verify that rate limiting is enforced on booking creation API to prevent abuse by limiting number of requests per IP or user within a timeframe.

steps.description: Send multiple booking creation requests rapidly from the same client
API rejects requests beyond rate limit with appropriate error code

title: Admin analytics and insights display
description: Validate that the admin panel correctly displays analytics data and booking insights with real-time updates.

steps.description: Login as admin
Navigate to analytics and insights section in admin panel
Charts and data summaries are displayed accurately reflecting booking activity
